data.title: Live Updates: Latest from Israel, Iran, and the Middle East | The Jerusalem Post
data.description: IDF kills Hezbollah chief's secretary • US military to stay in region until ceasefire complied with • Israeli arrested in Iranian plot to assassinate former PM Bennett
